quote: What an extraordinary experience! Very thought-provoking and soul-nourishing. Dodie was a perfect guide for traveling up and down and inwards in my mind and memory. The questions she asked gently helped reveal the answers that I already possessed and felt safe to release. The process wasn't frightening — rather, it was comfortable and easy. I left feeling mentally lighter, calm and relaxed. Her soft voice, insights, and inherent kindness and warmth make the session effortless and, dare I say, enjoyable.
author: Barbara Bucci
